mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_events ( event_type, product_id, location_id, quantity_change, reference_type, reference_id, created_by ) VALUES ( #{eventType}, #{productId}, #{locationId}, #{quantityChange}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, product_id AS productId, location_id AS locationId, quantity_change AS quantityChange, reference_type AS referenceType, reference_id AS referenceId, created_at AS createdAt, created_by AS createdBy FROM inventory_events WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND location_id = #{locationId} ORDER BY event_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, product_id AS productId, location_id AS locationId, quantity_change AS quantityChange, reference_type AS referenceType, reference_id AS referenceId, created_at AS createdAt, created_by AS createdBy FROM inventory_events WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
